case_title: YAN BIN LIU VS. MUKOMLA SUPRON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,005.00 FILED BY LIU, YAN BIN AS TO DEFENDANT SUPRON, MUKOMLA DBA (TRADITIONAL MEDICAL THAI MASSAGE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
